race.comment: AETHELWULF (2) was well backed when resuming last start over this course and distance and the money was spot on as he destroyed his rivals with a dazzling turn of foot. Gives every indication he will be winning better races and can pick this one up along the journey. TURNING CIRCLE (15) made a late challenge but failed to pick up the winner recently over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Has raced 20 times for just one win so she has probably bottomed out compared to the top pair, but a top three finish is in reach. FIERCENESS (8) hasn't done much wrong this prep and if he's close enough when straightening he can make his presence felt late. ROYAL CHIC (13) won last time and is open to further improvement third-up.
